properties.duration: 9-14 hours, varying with dosage (heavy doses can lead to much longer trips)
properties.effects: visual distortions, a sense of childlike wonder, brightening of colors,racing thoughts, hue shifts, euphoria, anxiety, confusion
properties.onset: 45-90 minutes depending on ROA and stomach contents
properties.summary: ALD-52, or N-acetyl-LSD is a less common chemical analogue of LSD, first synthesised by Albert Hoffman. It was famously implicated in the 'Orange Sunshine' trial. A psychedelic lysergamide, this compound exhibits similar properties to LSD, and is suspected to be a pro-drug for LSD.
